name: noStrudel
compose:
name: slashnode-nostrudel
services:
  cors:
    image: ghcr.io/hzrd149/docker-cors-anywhere:0.4.5
    container_name: nostrudel-cors
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      CORSANYWHERE_REQUIRE_HEADERS: host
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/hzrd149/nostrudel:1.1.0
    container_name: nostrudel-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    init: true
    depends_on:
      - cors
    environment:
      REQUEST_PROXY: cors:8080
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:3149:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
